languages.text: "Проклятый ксенос подписал себе приговор, оскорбив династию фон Валанциус".
"The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Проклятый ксенос подписал себе приговор, оскорбив династию фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: "The cursed xenos has signed his own death warrant by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."
"The cursed xenos has signed his own death warrant by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."

"The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."

languages.text: “那该死的异形从侮辱冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的那一刻起就注定灭亡。”
languages.original_text: "The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “那该死的异形从侮辱冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的那一刻起就注定灭亡。”

languages.text: «El maldito xenos ha firmado su sentencia al insultar a la dinastía von Valancius».
languages.original_text: "The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «El maldito xenos ha firmado su sentencia al insultar a la dinastía von Valancius».

languages.text: « En insultant la dynastie von Valancius, ce maudit xénos a signé son arrêt de mort. »
languages.original_text: "The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « En insultant la dynastie von Valancius, ce maudit xénos a signé son arrêt de mort. »

languages.text: "Kahrolası zeno, von Valancius hanedanlığına hakaret ederek kendi kaderini belirledi."
languages.original_text: "The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Kahrolası zeno, von Valancius hanedanlığına hakaret ederek kendi kaderini belirledi."

languages.text: "Der verfluchte Xenos hat sein eigenes Ende besiegelt, als er die Dynastie derer von Valancius beleidigt hat."
languages.original_text: "The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Der verfluchte Xenos hat sein eigenes Ende besiegelt, als er die Dynastie derer von Valancius beleidigt hat."

languages.text: 「呪われた異種族は、フォン・ヴァランシウス家を侮辱したことで、自らの滅亡を招いた」
languages.original_text: "The cursed xenos has sealed his own doom by insulting the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「呪われた異種族は、フォン・ヴァランシウス家を侮辱したことで、自らの滅亡を招いた」
